zeroconf_confirm.title: Set up {vendor} Device
zeroconf_confirm.description: A device was discovered at {host}. Please paste the 'Device Share URL' from the mobile app to complete setup.

model_config.title: Enter Device Model
model_config.description: Please confirm or edit the extracted device model. This helps Home Assistant correctly display and configure your {vendor} device.

error.invalid_url: The provided URL is invalid. Please ensure it starts with rusklimat:// or polaris://
error.mac_mismatch: The pasted URL belongs to a different device. The MAC address does not match the discovered device.
error.type_mismatch: The pasted URL is for a different device type. Please copy the link for the correct device.

abort.manual_setup_requires_discovery: This device requires specific data to connect. Please wait for Home Assistant to automatically discover it on your network.
